---
name: common-evidence
description: Defines evidence thresholds, artifact naming, confidence rules, and validation requirements.
---

How this skill is used: attach it whenever a task needs to decide whether a
finding is well-supported enough to be reported or validated.

Use this skill when a task must produce or judge a finding.

Required output qualities:
- identify the affected component or route
- include code or config references
- record payload pack or execution artifact paths when active testing occurred
- compare expected secure behavior with observed behavior
- explain impact and remediation
- distinguish candidate findings from validated findings
